We do not ask for your full name, email address, phone number or other personally identifiable as part of gameplay. The application does collect some non-sensitive, anonymous data as outlined below:

decoder_heading: This Log Data may include information such as your device Internet Protocol (“IP”) address, device name, operating system version, the configuration of the app when utilizing our Service, the time and date of your use of the Service, and other statistics.
